title: Aldo Rebelo Says He Knows What's Inside US UFO Files, Vows Brazil Reveal if Elected President
description: Brazilian presidential hopeful Aldo Rebelo claims to know the contents of US UFO files and pledges to reveal them if elected, raising questions about government transparency and alien disclosure.

title: 'UFO' filmed over central Estonian skies likely airplane contrails
description: A mysterious unidentified "burning object" spotted in the skies over central Estonia may simply be aircraft contrails in a light particular for the time of year, Maaleht reported.

title: We asked scientists what they think we’ll learn from the government’s UFO files. Here’s what they said.
description: Questions about what the federal government may know about extraterrestrial life in the cosmos — or possibly even here on Earth [...]

title: Arc Raiders Fans Think Embark Is Teasing Another New Threat as Video of UFO Sighting Circulates Online
